text.title: Product-Led Growth (PLG) Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding Product-Led Growth (PLG) plus the universal skip/run routing pair (referenced by the decision tree).

rule.statement: The product MUST deliver its aha moment within 5 minutes of first sign-in; activation flows exceeding the cap MUST be redesigned or fail PLG readiness review.
rule.rationale: Median first-session length on freemium SaaS is 6 minutes; aha after 5 minutes drops activation by half per minute.

rule.statement: Every PLG product MUST score Product-Qualified Leads on real usage signals (workspace count, integration count, invited collaborators, depth events); intent signals alone MUST NOT qualify.
rule.rationale: Intent-only signals (email opens, demo requests) are MQL noise; PQL must reflect actual product engagement to predict expansion.

rule.statement: Self-serve paid tiers MUST be reachable without a mandatory sales call; sales-assist is offered, not gated.
rule.rationale: Mandatory sales gates kill self-serve velocity; PLG funnels require frictionless paid conversion with optional sales-assist for high-value accounts.

rule.statement: Upgrade prompts MUST fire on hitting a usage limit (not on calendar cadence); calendar-driven upgrade emails are forbidden for PLG accounts.
rule.rationale: Calendar prompts are spam; limit-hit prompts are contextual and convert 4-7x higher per OpenView benchmarks.

rule.statement: The free tier MUST be sufficient to complete at least one core job-to-be-done end-to-end; freemium that crippleware-blocks the core JTBD MUST be redesigned.
rule.rationale: Crippleware freemium trains users that the product cannot do the job; the JTBD-complete free tier is the engine of word-of-mouth.

rule.statement: If preconditions in `## Applies If` do not ALL hold OR any disqualifier in `## Skip If` fires, the agent MUST skip this methodology and document the skip reason in the cycle artefact.
rule.rationale: A minimum-form decision tree must route 'preconditions-not-satisfied' to skip; this rule is the canonical target.

rule.statement: If preconditions in `## Applies If` ALL hold AND no disqualifier fires, the agent MUST run the methodology end-to-end and produce the artefact specified in 02-output-contract.xml.
rule.rationale: Pair to skip-this-methodology; together they form the always-present minimal route.
